---
title: "LDA"
author: "Anna Hyunjung Kim"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
student <- read.csv("./student/student-por.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";")
head(student, 2)
```

```{r}
student <- student[, !(names(student) %in% c("G1", "G2"))]
head(student, 2)

names(student)
```

```{r}
student$pass <- ifelse(student$G3 >= 12, 1, 0)
student$pass <- as.factor(student$pass)
```

```{r}
set.seed(321)
train_index <- sample(1:nrow(student), 0.7 * nrow(student))
train <- student[train_index, ]
test <- student[-train_index, ]
```

```{r}
library(MASS)
```


```{r}
lda_model <- lda(pass ~ . - G3, data = train)

lda_pred <- predict(lda_model, test)$class

mean(lda_pred == test$pass)
```

```{r}
lda_model
```


```{r}
table(Predicted = lda_pred, Actual = test$pass)
```
